The '''Alzoc III Food Commissioner''' gave food to the miners of [[Alzoc III/Legends|Alzoc III]]. He was farming multiple [[Shaak/Legends|shaaks]] when [[Tyber Zann]] and a squad then killed ten shaaks and brought their skulls and spines to him to intimidate him into doing their bidding.
